creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-13 16:39:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/roundcube-mvision2 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/roundcube-mvision2/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  MVision - theme for RoundCube Web Mail, the opensource PHP/MySQL web mail
  application.
  
  Features:
  
  - Three Pane Liquid Layout;
  - Fully supports Horizontal and Vertical layout views;
  - Additional configuration for either Horizontal or Vertical layout;
  - End user support for dynamically switching between Horizontal and Vertical
    layouts;
  - Friendly looking theme with nice graphics;
  
  WWW: http://www.roundcubethemes.net/
  
  PR:             ports/136828
  Submitted by:   Alexey V. Degtyarev
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.967     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-mvision2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/roundcube-mvision2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-mvision2/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-mvision2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +275 -0    ports/mail/roundcube-mvision2/pkg-plist (new)
